prompt:
Create a luxury Pakistani fashion campaign poster inspired by Maria.B Pret & Couture featuring a beautiful Pakistani model wearing an elegant deep burgundy-red non-bridal suit with refined golden embroidery, embroidered sleeves, tailored pants, and a sheer organza dupatta flowing gracefully. Style her with antique gold chandelier earrings, stacked golden bangles, soft glam makeup, and voluminous wavy hair.

Use a warm beige luxury background with soft sunlight shadows, elegant editorial typography, and aesthetic arrows pointing toward Fabric, Embroidery, Jewelry, and Craftsmanship. Design it like a professional Vogue-style Instagram fashion advertisement with cinematic lighting, realistic fabric textures, premium color grading, and ultra-detailed luxury fashion aesthetics.

Color palette: burgundy, wine red, muted gold, champagne beige, warm ivory.
4:5 vertical Instagram post, Ultra HD, hyper realistic, premium graphic designer quality.
